name: Bishop Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and stir in flour and 1 cup of chopped pecans.
2. Continue stirring until a thick paste is formed, with no flour lumps visible.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased 13x10 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
5. Allow to cool completely before assembling the filling.
6. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, confectioners sugar, and 1 cup whipped topping. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined.
7. Spoon the mixture into the cooled crust, smoothing the top with a spatula.
8. Pour the chocolate pudding mix and milk mixture (beat well) over the cream cheese layer.
9. Once the chocolate layer has set slightly, spoon on additional whipped topping to form an additional 1/2 inch layer above the chocolate.
10. Sprinkle remaining chopped pecans over the top.
11. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving.
From the Pipe Dream Restaurant, Willington, CT
